triton_trisis.description: TRITON/TRISIS — Targeting Schneider Electric Triconex safety systems. Highly automated, expert-level Modbus knowledge, low stealth (moves quickly once in).
triton_trisis.source: CISA ICS-CERT Advisory ICSA-18-100-03; Dragos Year in Review 2018

industroyer.description: Industroyer/Crashoverride — Ukraine power grid attacks. Thorough register scanning, targets specific coils. Moderate automation, deliberate pace.
industroyer.source: ESET Industroyer whitepaper; Mandiant APT-SandWorm analysis

pipedream.description: PIPEDREAM/INCONTROLLER — CISA/NSA advisory 2022. Extremely high expertise, low noise signature, slow deliberate reconnaissance before payload delivery.
pipedream.source: CISA/NSA/FBI/DOE Joint Advisory AA22-103A; Mandiant M-Trends 2022

darkside_ics.description: DarkSide ransomware operators with ICS pivot capability. High write aggression, rapid command bursts, brute-force approach to register space.
darkside_ics.source: CISA Alert AA21-131A; Colonial Pipeline incident analysis

sandworm.description: Sandworm Team (GRU Unit 74455). Balanced multi-stage campaigns; moderate all metrics, long dwell time, patient lateral movement across OT segments.
sandworm.source: US-CERT Alert TA17-293A; ESET whitepaper on BlackEnergy

generic_script_kiddie.description: Unskilled attacker using off-the-shelf Modbus scanners (Modscan, mbtget). Low expertise, high noise, random patterns, many invalid function codes.
generic_script_kiddie.source: Observed patterns in Shodan-exposed Modbus honeypots
